claims.claim: Semantic stale timing uses sigmoid decay plus low-fill recovery handoff, not a hard cliff.
release_fill must not collapse into the low-fill hold threshold or create unbounded context persistence.
evidence: /Users/v/other/minime/minime/src/sensory_bus.rs: release_fill max(STALE_SEMANTIC_RECOVERY_HOLD_FILL + 0.01) clamp and SEMANTIC_CONTEXT_PERSISTENCE_MAX_MULT cap

claims.claim: Retuning recovery/release fill, stale-window cadence, or context persistence scaling would change live Minime semantic retention behavior.
